changelog: Telemetry: When WatchProgressStore.save() rejects a write because the title is blank, the app now fires a one-shot diagnostic ping to the crash dashboard with kind/streamId/position/duration + breadcrumbs. Rate-limited to one ping per event-tag per app launch so a tight loop can't flood the server. This will help pinpoint exactly which player launch path was feeding empty channelName + missing PlaybackMeta if it ever happens again.
Continue Watching: Orphan blank "SERIES" cards are auto-cleaned on next Home open (defence-in-depth: save() rejects blank-title writes, continueWatching() filters them, pruneOld() hard-deletes them).
Side-rail focus: v1.44.42 baseline (no risky modifiers).
Continue Watching: Are-you-done prompt (Dialog-wrapped), Clear All, tombstone deletion, 14-day prune, auto-focus first CW tile.
